start.text: The game leading to death officially begins...
Where are those who wish to perish?
The afterlife can still accommodate countless souls... but you aren't worthy of experiencing it.
Why not give me a cruise ship full of living people?
Perhaps entire swathes of death are what you're looking forward to... isn't that right?
I only need to glance at them to end their pathetic lives...
How can one truly taste death when separated by billions of stars...?

start_boss.text: Looks like things are about to get interesting...
Seems you're someone who can't die... how unfortunate
It's time to let those ancient beings die once...
Don't think lifeless things won't encounter death...
Just dying once... no need to worry too much...

retreat.text: A cowardly act... coming from you...
Is this the reason you disturbed me...?
The living always care about assets that become meaningless after death...
This ship could still cause so many more deaths?
You want to take it home... when it possesses nothing?

out_of_missiles.text: Even the most brilliant fireworks must have a final moment...
Next... I'll have to find another way to create death...

engaged.text: Will you be excited by this...?
Every tiny creature has yearned for that eternal moment...
Tell me, do you prefer heaven or hell?
This is your passport to the other world...
Between this world and the next, there might only be a single bullet's distance...

need_help.text: Hurry... let more living beings come to their death...
Is this the powerless resistance of living souls...?
Looks like... now you'll have to pay a real price...
Seems like you want to know how long you have before truly dying...

pursuing.text: I'm coming... only to take away your life that has reached its limit...
Even across thousands of years, people still cannot overcome their fear of death.
Give me a reason not to kill you... but it has never existed...
Now, you only await a light that symbolizes death...

running.text: I will always reach where I need to go... no matter how long...
Don't rush... I've already reached your future in your past...

hull_90.text: When you feel time slowing around you... I have already arrived beside you.

hull_50.text: Come... sacrifice souls to gain more powerful strength!
Sadly... even this won't add half a death...
Can you feel that trembling of the soul?
Looks like... returning to their homeland is their only wish...

hull_30.text: Only when near death do people gradually understand life's true meaning...
Hanging by a thread also means you're about to find life in death...
Placed in a desperate situation and then dying... how wonderful...
The further from the void... the closer to death...
That door has quietly opened just a crack...

death.text: At least in dying... I lived more than most...
I wish this ship's cabins were filled with crew...
Did you do as I said... stuffing more slaves in the cargo hold? Heh... what a pity.
I sincerely await the day you personally embrace death...

victory.text: This time... how many did I take?
Don't you feel heartache...? At least I don't.
When lost souls fill this entire star sector... you'll have some credit for that...
Congratulations... you've successfully added more death to this star sector...
